ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "date_of_incident" TEXT /* Date when the incident occurred */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week when the incident occurred */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month when the incident occurred */,
  "number_victims_u18" INTEGER /* Number of victims under 18 years old */,
  "number_victims_o18" INTEGER /* Number of victims over 18 years old */,
  "number_offenders_u18" INTEGER /* Number of offenders under 18 years old */,
  "number_offenders_o18" INTEGER /* Number of offenders over 18 years old */,
  "offender_race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race or ethnicity of the offenders */,
  "offenses" INTEGER /* ID of the offense committed */,
  "offense_location" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the offense occurred */,
  "bias" INTEGER /* ID of the bias motivation behind the offense */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the incident */,
  "incident_location_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the incident location */,
  "incident_city" TEXT /* City where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_state" TEXT /* State where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_country" TEXT /* Country where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time when the incident occurred */,
  "victim_age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the victims */,
  "offender_age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the offenders */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Status of the incident */,
  "incident_reporter" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the person reporting the incident */,
  "incident_report_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was reported */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_offense_location FOREIGN KEY ("offense_location") REFERENCES offense_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_bias FOREIGN KEY ("bias") REFERENCES bias_motivations ("bias_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_offenses FOREIGN KEY ("offenses") REFERENCES offense_types ("offense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bias_motivations" (
  "bias_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bias motivation */,
  "bias_name" TEXT /* Name of the bias motivation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bias motivation */,
  "bias_category" TEXT /* Category of the bias motivation */,
  "bias_prevalence" TEXT /* Prevalence of the bias motivation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bias_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offense_types" (
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offense type */,
  "offense_name" TEXT /* Name of the offense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offense */,
  "offense_category" TEXT /* Category of the offense */,
  "offense_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the offense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offense_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offense location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "location_category" TEXT /* Category of the location */,
  "location_size" TEXT /* Size of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* User's position or rank */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "user_access_level" TEXT /* User's access level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" TEXT /* ID of the incident report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the incident report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_access_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
